name: python3-traitlets
title: python3-traitlets
summary: Lightweight Traits-like package for Python (Python 3 library)
description:
Lightweight Traits-like package for Python (Python 3 library)
A lightweight pure-Python derivative of Enthought Traits, used
for configuring Python objects.
.
It powers the config system of IPython and Jupyter.
.
This package contains the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-traitlets because Lightweight Traits-like package for Python (Python 3 library).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-traitlets as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-traitlets with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-traitlets --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
